import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaFacebook, FaTwitter, FaInstagram, FaLinkedin, FaGithub, FaEnvelope, FaPhone, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaHeart, FaGraduationCap, FaBookOpen, FaChartLine, FaUserGraduate, FaRocket, FaStar } from 'react-icons/fa'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const footerStyle = { background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%)', color: 'white', padding: '4rem 2rem 2rem', marginTop: 'auto', borderTop: '4px solid #4f46e5', fontFamily: "'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif", position: 'relative', overflow: 'hidden', }; const containerStyle = { maxWidth: '1280px', margin: '0 auto', position: 'relative', zIndex: 1, }; // Responsive grid with media queries as objects const gridStyle = { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(1, 1fr)', gap: '3rem', }; const sectionTitleStyle = { fontSize: '1.25rem', fontWeight: '700', marginBottom: '1.5rem', color: '#f8fafc', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', paddingBottom: '0.75rem', borderBottom: '2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', }; const linkItemStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', color: '#cbd5e1', textDecoration: 'none', padding: '0.5rem 0', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', fontSize: '0.95rem', fontWeight: '400', cursor: 'pointer', }; const contactItemStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: '1rem', marginBottom: '1.25rem', color: '#cbd5e1', fontSize: '0.95rem', lineHeight: '1.5', }; const iconWrapperStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', width: '36px', height: '36px', borderRadius: '50%', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', flexShrink: 0, }; const logoStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '0.75rem', fontSize: '1.75rem', fontWeight: '800', marginBottom: '1.5rem', color: 'white', textDecoration: 'none', }; const logoGradientStyle = { background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text', WebkitTextFillColor: 'transparent', }; const descriptionStyle = { color: '#94a3b8', lineHeight: '1.7', marginBottom: '2rem', fontSize: '0.95rem', }; const socialLinksStyle = { display: 'flex', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '2rem', flexWrap: 'wrap', }; const socialIconStyle = { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', width: '44px', height: '44px', borderRadius: '12px', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', color: '#cbd5e1', fontSize: '1.2rem', transition: 'all 0.3s ease', textDecoration: 'none', cursor: 'pointer', }; const newsletterStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '1.5rem', borderRadius: '16px', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '1.5rem', }; const inputStyle = { width: '100%', padding: '0.875rem 1rem', background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', borderRadius: '10px', color: 'white', fontSize: '0.95rem', marginBottom: '1rem', outline: 'none', transition: 'all 0.3s', }; const buttonStyle = { width: '100%', padding: '0.875rem', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', color: 'white', border: 'none', borderRadius: '10px', fontSize: '1rem', fontWeight: '600', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'all 0.3s', display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: '0.5rem', }; const statsGridStyle = { display: 'grid', gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(2, 1fr)', gap: '1rem', marginTop: '1.5rem', }; const statCardStyle = { background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)', padding: '1rem', borderRadius: '12px', textAlign: 'center', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', }; const statNumberStyle = { fontSize: '1.5rem', fontWeight: '700', background: 'linear-gradient(90deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed)', WebkitBackgroundClip: 'text', WebkitTextFillColor: 'transparent', marginBottom: '0.25rem', }; const statLabelStyle = { fontSize: '0.8rem', color: '#94a3b8', fontWeight: '500', }; const copyrightStyle = { borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', marginTop: '4rem', paddingTop: '2rem', textAlign: 'center', color: '#94a3b8', fontSize: '0.9rem', }; const badgeStyle = { background: 'rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2)', color: '#818cf8', padding: '0.25rem 0.75rem', borderRadius: '20px', fontSize: '0.75rem', fontWeight: '600', marginLeft: '0.5rem', }; // Media query styles as separate objects const mediaStyles = ` @media (min-width: 768px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important; } .footer-copyright-row { flex-direction: row !important; justify-content: space-between !important; } } @media (min-width: 1024px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr) !important; } } a:hover { color: white !important; transform: translateX(8px) !important; } .social-icon:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f46e5, #7c3aed) !important; color: white !important; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.4) !important; } button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) !important; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.4) !important; } input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5 !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.2) !important; } `; return (

); }; export default Footer;
